_comment: Copy to auth/allowed-clients.json and adapt. allowed_ips accepts bare IPs or CIDR-like prefixes (first 3 octets matched for /24-style ranges). api_keys maps a client name to a secret — callers must send it as the X-API-Key header.
_docker_note: When running in Docker, requests from the host come in via the docker bridge gateway (typically 172.17.0.0/24 or 10.0.0.0/24 for custom networks). Add that range if testing from the host; or use docker exec to hit localhost from inside the container.
